# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

import jenkins.model.*
 
def call() {   // Declare the function to be called from Jenkin's declarative pipeline scripting tool (DSL)    
    def env = [(params): 'env']      // Define environment variables for use in shell commands and tests        
      
    node('builder'){  // Specify a builder that will execute this step. The name of the Jenkins agent must match here to trigger it  
        stage ('Build Environment Setup' ) {    
            withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'jenkinspipeline-user', usernameVariable: 'USERNAME_VARIABLE', passwordVariable: 'PASSWORD_VARIABLE')])  // Use Jenkins credentials to set environment variables  
                env.set('BUILD_ENV','${env}');     echo "Build Environment Setup" + '\n'+ env;     
        }   
        
       stage ('Custom Build Commands Execution ') {         
            withEnv(env){  // Use environment variables set in the previous step  
                sh """ $BUILD_COMMANDS"""     # Run custom build commands (replace BUILD_COMMANDS by a Jenkins parameter or user input, for example: "./gradlew clean test" )    echo 'Custom Build Commands Execution' + '\n';     
            }  
       }  // End of Custom command execution stage.    
       
        
          if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(release|master)$/) {           staging('Deploy to Staging Environment'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start Deployment" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for deployment steps in the 'staging environment'.    
        else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(qa|testing)$/) {           staging('Deploy to QA Environment'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start Testing" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for testing steps in the 'QA environment'.    
        else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(prod|production)$/) {           staging('Deploy to Production Environment'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start Deployment" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for deployment steps in the 'Production environment'.    
       else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(dev|development)$/) {           staging('Deploy to Development Environment'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start DevOps" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for devops steps in the 'Development environment'.    
       else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(all)$/) {           staging('Deploy to All Environments'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start Deployment" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for deployment steps in all environments.    
       else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(none)$/) {           staging('No Environment'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start Deployment" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for deployment steps in no environment.    
       else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(fail)$/) {           staging('Fail Environment'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start Deployment" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for deployment steps in fail environment.    
       else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(pass)$/) {           staging('Pass Environment'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start Deployment" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for deployment steps in pass environment.    
       else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(default)$/) {           staging('Default Environment'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start Deployment" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for deployment steps in default environment.    
       else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(*)$/) {          stage ('Deploy to All Environments'){             sh '''#!/bin/bash    echo "Start Deployment" + '\n';'''   }  // Run a script for deployment steps in all environments.    
       else if (env['BUILD_ENV'] ==~ /^(*)$/) {          stage ('No Environment'){              withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'jenkinspipeline-user', usernameVariable: '', passwordVariable:'PASSWORD' )])  // Use Jenkins credentials to set environment variables  
                env.set('BUILD_ENV','$env');     echo "No Environment" + '\n';      }    else {         stage ('Fail Environments'){              withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'jenkinspipeline-user', usernameVariable:'USERNAME' , passwordVariable : '' )])  // Use Jenkins credentials to set environment variables  
                env.set('BUILD_ENV','$env');     echo "Fail Environments" + '\n';      }    }}         catch (Exception e){          stage ('Error'){              withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'jenkinspipeline-user', usernameVariable:'USERNAME' , passwordVariable : '' )])  // Use Jenkins credentials to set environment variables  
                env.set('BUILD_ENV','$env');     echo "Error" + '\n';      }    }}         finally {          stage ('End'){              withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'jenkinspipeline-user', usernameVariable:'USERNAME' , passwordVariable : '' )])  // Use Jenkins credentials to set environment variables  
                env.set('BUILD_ENV','$env');     echo "End" + '\n';      }    }}         println(params)          return;}}`       end of script}
